content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative self-improvement pipeline as the first concrete end-to-end implementation of the abstract LLM self-reflection mechanism framework, extending multi-perspective reflection methods like Self-Contrast and Mirror to work for unstructured output refinement without external supervision. This creates a hybrid approach where multi-perspective inconsistency detection is injected into each iteration of Self-Refine to boost refinement quality without adding training data or extra model overhead.
